compiled_state.title: RED: Write outbound round-trip integration test (local relates_to to Jira Relates)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write an integration test that demonstrates the full outbound round-trip: create a local relates_to link via CLI, run outbound sync, confirm the link appears in (mock) Jira as a Relates link. Uses mock Jira API (no live Jira instance).

## Test Approach
Given: Two local tickets each with SYNC events mapping to Jira keys PROJ-1 and PROJ-2. Mock AcliClient configured.
When: A relates_to link is created between the tickets (writing a LINK event file), then process_outbound() is called with the event
Then: AcliClient.set_relationship(PROJ-1, PROJ-2, "Relates") is called, confirming the link would appear in Jira

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_integration.py (Edit: add round-trip integration test)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Integration test for outbound round-trip exists
  Verify: grep -q "round_trip\|outbound.*link\|relates_to.*jira" tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_integration.py
- [ ] Test passes (verifies existing LINK handler implementation from story b807-5dec)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_integration.py -k "round_trip" --tb=short -q
